description_long: This is a futuristic, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a compact, angular body and two prominent, forward-swept wings. The vehicle features a robust central fuselage with reinforced paneling and a cockpit area protected by layered armor. Twin engine nacelles are mounted on each wing, each with visible exhaust ports at the rear, suggesting high maneuverability and thrust. The surface is finished in a light gray color with subtle weathering and red accent markings near the wingtips, giving it a utilitarian yet aggressive appearance. The underside and rear show large, circular thrusters, indicating vertical takeoff and landing capability. No visible wheels or traditional landing gear are present, emphasizing its advanced, possibly aerial or hover-based design.
description: A compact, angular combat tactical vehicle with forward-swept wings, heavy armor, and large rear thrusters, finished in light gray with red accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored cockpit, angular body, and forward-swept wings with red accents at the tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered armor, engine nacelle, and the vehicle's compact, aerodynamic profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals two large circular thrusters and the full span of the wings, emphasizing propulsion features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the engine nacelle, wing structure, and armored body details.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating, especially around the cockpit and central fuselage; panels appear sloped and reinforced.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid light gray with minor weathering and red accent markings; no camouflage pattern visible.
